$schema: Each entry should describe a single deploy. The 'sha' field is matched against the deployed commit SHA (either short or full form). Place newest entries first. Markdown is NOT rendered — keep 'changes' as plain strings.

releases.title: Pipeline redesign + Slate clip workshop
changes: Complete pipeline UX redesign — new Overview dashboard, progress stepper, and streamlined path from Words through publish.
Stories is now a clean card grid; Library is slimmed down to what you actually use.
Slate clip workshop: trim any clip to its best moment, caption it from what's said, then post straight to social or save as b-roll.
Approved clips are indexed into visual memory so they surface as suggestions in future stories.
Auto-detect interview video offset — no more manual slider when syncing phone audio to video.
Videos attached to Instagram-targeted posts now publish as Reels automatically.
Speaker role is now set in upload Step 1.

releases.title: Visual memory for media suggestions
changes: Approved Library clips are now indexed into visual memory.
Slate can rank your existing footage against any story you're building.
Video dimension backfill via Mux API — fixes collapsed video boxes for older uploads.

releases.title: Security + editorial improvements
changes: Clip rendering is now gated on patient consent status.
Approve-package writes are now atomic — no more partial saves on slow connections.
Idempotency guard prevents duplicate approvals on rapid double-tap.

releases.title: Auto-update notifications
changes: The app now alerts you when a new version is available — no more hard refresh.
Buffer queue mode in the publish action sheet.
